texto: We are writing in the age of stylish minimalism that in truth has become even more cautious because of word processing. Nowadays, creative writing students are underwriting rather than overdoing it.
explicacao: Citação de Stephen Kuusisto sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We are writing in the age of stylish minimalism that in truth has become even more cautious becau…” articula reflexao, writing, stylish em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
